notes: iPad support: install from Safari with Add to Home Screen for a full-screen offline app - the layout now respects iPad safe areas and runs as a proper standalone app. Plus 0.10.0: the Chords page follows the Fretboard's scale, chord shapes get fretboard-style and tab views, and the Fretboard practice bar gains a live tab view of the current exercise. NOTE: updating from 0.6.1 or older requires uninstalling the old app first (new signing key).
